channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Paxos opens a $1M bug bounty across USDG, PYUSD, PAXG and Cantina—security researchers, break it all. 🛡️🧪 https://Blockchain.News/news/paxos-1m-bug-bounty-cantina-pyusd-paxg-usdg #CryptoSecurity #BugBounty #Paxos

item.title: Harvey AI surges to an $11B valuation as half UK firms deploy legal AI—but only 20% embed in workflows. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/harvey-ai-11b-valuation-legal-adoption-tipping-point #AI #LegalTech #HarveyAI
item.description: Harvey AI surges to an $11B valuation as half UK firms deploy legal AI—but only 20% embed in workflows. 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/harvey-ai-11b-valuation-legal-adoption-tipping-point #AI #LegalTech #HarveyAI

item.title: USDC now lands on Pharos L1—a compliance-first bridge for tokenized real-world assets. CCTP cuts bridge risk: burn on origin, mint on destination. 🚦🪙 https://Blockchain.News/news/circle-usdc-cctp-pharos-l1-mainnet-integration #USDC #DeFi #Blockchains
item.description: USDC now lands on Pharos L1—a compliance-first bridge for tokenized real-world assets. CCTP cuts bridge risk: burn on origin, mint on destination. 🚦🪙 https://Blockchain.News/news/circle-usdc-cctp-pharos-l1-mainnet-integration #USDC #DeFi #Blockchains
